title: Pan-Seared Shungiku with Papillote Fritters
description: A crispy and savory dish featuring the delicate flavor of shungiku paired with crunchy papillote fritters. Perfect for a light dinner or snack.
instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the fatty and cook until crispy, then remove from heat.
In a bowl, mix together the flour, eggs, salt, and pepper.
Add the chopped papillote and mix until a dough forms.
Shape the dough into small patties and fry until golden brown.
In a separate pan, heat a small amount of oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped shungiku and cook until wilted.
Serve the shungiku with the papillote fritters and crispy fatty on top.
